name: Charlotte AI AgentWorks
description: No-code platform for building, orchestrating, and scaling custom security agents. Part of the CrowdStrike Falcon platform. Designed to enable security teams to create agentic security workforces. Built-in support for major AI models (OpenAI, Anthropic, Anthropic Claude) and partnerships with cloud providers (AWS, Google Cloud).
capabilities: Build custom security agents without code
Integrate with Falcon platform security data
Template library for pre-built security agents
notes: Launched March 25, 2026 at RSA 2026. Key launch partners include Accenture, AWS, Anthropic, Deloitte, OpenAI, Salesforce. Explicitly designed for autonomous agent operation in security context with human-in-the-loop oversight.
